description: Published SIMULATOR onboard-FPV camera calibration (ADR-0021, schema v2). SIM / NOT FOR FLIGHT: a simulated pinhole camera and synthetic design eye, never real HUD optics. Generated from pilotage_adapter_api::calibration::sim_fpv_calibration; canonicalBase64 is the exact canonical byte form the recorded SHA-256 is taken over. Derivable quantities (field of view, pixel-to-angle factor, budget totals) are NOT stored; the browser recomputes the hash over these bytes, derives those quantities, semantically validates the parsed geometry/lifecycle/allowances, and fails closed on any mismatch or invariant violation.
